sentence_reviews.text: Speculative and assisted decoding propose multiple future tokens with a cheaper process and verify them in parallel with the target model.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Chen et al. describe speculative sampling using an approximation model to generate candidate tokens and the target model to verify multiple tokens in parallel.
sentence_reviews.notes: Directly supported by the speculative sampling paper.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Speculative, parallel & assisted decoding is to connect Model servers & inference runtimes, Autoregressive decoding to downstream capabilities including Large language models, Conversational assistants & chatbots.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: The cited sources support some underlying mechanisms, but this downstream capability list is atlas graph positioning rather than a directly sourced claim.
sentence_reviews.notes: Use a narrower claim or add sources for each downstream dependency if exact verification is required.
